evals.prompt: Open a visible browser to https://example.com, verify it is headed, take a snapshot, and close the session.
evals.expected_output: Uses playwright-cli open --headed, verifies with list, snapshots the page, and closes the browser.
expectations: The workflow uses --headed because the user asked for a visible browser.
The workflow runs playwright-cli list after opening.
The workflow takes a snapshot before reporting page state.
The workflow closes the browser session.

evals.prompt: Scrape all links from a webpage in the background and save them to links.json.
evals.expected_output: Uses headless open, raw eval with JSON.stringify, writes links.json, and cleans up.
expectations: The workflow does not use --headed because the task is background scraping.
The workflow uses --raw eval or another machine-readable extraction method.
The workflow saves the extracted links to links.json.
The workflow closes the browser session.

evals.prompt: Help me debug a button that does nothing after I click it.
evals.expected_output: Opens the page, snapshots before clicking, clicks via ref, checks console/network and page state, then reports findings.
expectations: The workflow takes a snapshot before clicking.
The workflow verifies the result after the click.
The workflow checks console logs or network requests when debugging.
The workflow avoids exposing secrets in the report.
